title: Cr7 Legendary Championship Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cr7 Legendary Championship Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Epic cinematic Cristiano Ronaldo championship poster built around Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal national team jersey, number 7, standing heroically at the center of a massive football stadium with golden crown floating above his head and red energy surrounding his body, and SIUU celebration, trophy lift, free-kick stance, iconic goal celebrations, silhouette walking toward the light, and giant CR7 logo in the sky. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal national team jersey, number 7 stands heroically at the center with intense expression, realistic skin texture, Portugal national team jersey number 7, championship aura, and golden crown floating above his head. Scene: cheering fans, fireworks, Champions League atmosphere, floating footballs, glowing trophies, futuristic billboards, sparks, smoke, lightning, confetti, shattered glass, creates the massive football stadium with cheering fans, fireworks, Champions League atmosphere, stadium floodlights, holographic billboards, floating footballs, glowing trophies, sparks, smoke, confetti, and red energy. Composition: standing heroically at the center of a massive football stadium with golden crown floating above his head and red energy surrounding his body; fixed layered vertical sports poster with central heroic Ronaldo, blended legendary moments in the background, giant CR7 logo in the sky, massive typography, and explosive red-black-gold campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: SIUU celebration, trophy lift, free-kick stance, iconic goal celebrations, silhouette walking toward the light, and giant CR7 logo in the sky blend behind the central portrait while the CR7 sky logo, crown, Portugal kit, glowing trophies, shattered glass, glitch particles, paint splashes, and dynamic motion streaks define the template. Style: Hyper-detailed cinematic sports poster, premium sports magazine cover aesthetic, Behance graphic design style, Nike campaign quality, HDR, ultra-sharp focus, poster masterpiece finish, and dramatic rim lighting. Color Palette: Fixed crimson red, gold, black, silver, white highlights, glowing red energy, stadium shadow, crown gold, and cinematic high-contrast sparks. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, volumetric light rays, stadium floodlights, golden crown glow, red energy surrounding the body, lightning accents, and high-contrast championship depth. Camera: Vertical heroic poster composition with central full or three-quarter figure, background montage depth, sharp face detail, readable kit number 7, and layered sports-ad scale. Typography: CR7, THE GOAT, THE LEGEND, THE KING OF FOOTBALL must appear as massive integrated typography: CR7, THE GOAT, THE LEGEND, and THE KING OF FOOTBALL, all readable and part of the poster design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Epic cinematic Cristiano Ronaldo championship poster built around Cristiano Ronaldo as Portugal number 7 with intense champion expression, central heroic CR7 portrait under a floating golden crown, surrounded by crimson energy and stadium floodlights, and SIUU celebration silhouette, trophy raise, free-kick stance, record-breaking goal montage, walk toward the light, and giant CR7 sky emblem. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo as Portugal number 7 with intense champion expression stands heroically at the center with intense expression, realistic skin texture, Portugal national team jersey number 7, championship aura, and golden crown floating above his head. Scene: packed stadium, fireworks, red-black paint splashes, holographic achievement boards, glowing trophies, confetti, shattered glass effects, sparks, smoke, and lightning creates the massive football stadium with cheering fans, fireworks, Champions League atmosphere, stadium floodlights, holographic billboards, floating footballs, glowing trophies, sparks, smoke, confetti, and red energy. Composition: central heroic CR7 portrait under a floating golden crown, surrounded by crimson energy and stadium floodlights; fixed layered vertical sports poster with central heroic Ronaldo, blended legendary moments in the background, giant CR7 logo in the sky, massive typography, and explosive red-black-gold campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: SIUU celebration silhouette, trophy raise, free-kick stance, record-breaking goal montage, walk toward the light, and giant CR7 sky emblem blend behind the central portrait while the CR7 sky logo, crown, Portugal kit, glowing trophies, shattered glass, glitch particles, paint splashes, and dynamic motion streaks define the template. Style: Hyper-detailed cinematic sports poster, premium sports magazine cover aesthetic, Behance graphic design style, Nike campaign quality, HDR, ultra-sharp focus, poster masterpiece finish, and dramatic rim lighting. Color Palette: Fixed crimson red, gold, black, silver, white highlights, glowing red energy, stadium shadow, crown gold, and cinematic high-contrast sparks. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, volumetric light rays, stadium floodlights, golden crown glow, red energy surrounding the body, lightning accents, and high-contrast championship depth. Camera: Vertical heroic poster composition with central full or three-quarter figure, background montage depth, sharp face detail, readable kit number 7, and layered sports-ad scale. Typography: CR7, THE GOAT, THE LEGEND, THE KING OF FOOTBALL must appear as massive integrated typography: CR7, THE GOAT, THE LEGEND, and THE KING OF FOOTBALL, all readable and part of the poster design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
